name: aws-microservice
description: Run scripts for all microservices locally

scripts.dev:auth: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/auth-service     && .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local
scripts.dev:member: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/member-service   && .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local
scripts.dev:file: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/file-service     && .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local
scripts.dev:mail: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/mail-service     && .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local
scripts.dev:master: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/master-service   && .\mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=local
scripts.build:auth: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/auth-service     && .\mvnw.cmd clean package -DskipTests
scripts.build:member: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/member-service   && .\mvnw.cmd clean package -DskipTests
scripts.build:file: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/file-service     && .\mvnw.cmd clean package -DskipTests
scripts.build:mail: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/mail-service     && .\mvnw.cmd clean package -DskipTests
scripts.build:master: set "JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21" && set "PATH=%JAVA_HOME%\bin;%PATH%" && cd services/master-service   && .\mvnw.cmd clean package -DskipTests
scripts.build:all: npm run build:auth && npm run build:member && npm run build:file && npm run build:mail && npm run build:master
